title: Designing an Agent's Goals and Objectives
scenario: Design a set of goals and objectives for an agent that provides customer support. The goals should be specific, measurable, achievable, relevant, and time-bound (SMART). The output should be in the format of a simple list.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 150-word limit.
Check if the goals are specific, measurable, achievable, relevant, and time-bound.
Check if the output is grammatically correct.
